name: decision_band_verbatim
value: | F01 E1-HANDLE-FORENSICS | TOP | GATED(F00) | CPU-PAR | 승계 — O-A/O-B/r_pair/unit factor 결정 lattice, CPU `<1h` | F00 |

name: selection_lineage
value: Rebuild each ordered top-20 selector from sortkey_probe.per_def ranks (ascending non-null rank, deterministic def-name tie break), compare order and set against sortkey_probe.top20.{a_original,b_absdiff,c_wrankdiff,d_bootstrap}, and trace each a_original definition through raw unit_id/def records and the staged-DXF INSERT definition graph. Report exact mismatches and root reachability; absent nodes are UNKNOWN, never inferred.

name: O-A annotation-side wall observation
value: For each definition, O-A likelihood is the median of available wall_likelihood values from the five authorized raw panel judges. O-A positive iff median >= 0.50. O-A handles are the case-normalized union of syntactically valid wall_line_handles from those same records, retaining per-judge provenance. No missing judge value is imputed; if no judge value exists, O-A is UNKNOWN.

name: O-B staged-DXF geometric pair observation
value: Within each staged-DXF block definition, candidate straight primitives are LINEs and straight two-vertex LWPOLYLINEs. An unordered pair is O-B-positive when both lengths are >0, acute angular difference <=1 degree, perpendicular separation is 50..500 drawing units inclusive, projected longitudinal overlap divided by shorter length is >=0.50, and length ratio shorter/longer is >=0.50. Entity handles and owner definitions must be directly parsed from the staged DXF; missing geometry is UNKNOWN.

name: r_pair
value: r_pair = number of distinct valid O-A straight-primitive handles that participate in at least one O-B-positive pair / number of distinct valid O-A straight-primitive handles. Also report the definition-level analogue. A zero denominator yields UNKNOWN.

name: unit_factor
value: For every bbox_units.per_def anchor match, use ratio_vs_nearest_bbox_span when finite, otherwise ratio_vs_nearest_line_span. Test frozen candidates {1,10,25.4,304.8,1000}; a ratio supports a candidate when relative error <=1%. unit_factor is the candidate with maximal support only if at least 5 anchors support it and its share among all candidate-supported anchors is >=0.80; otherwise UNKNOWN. Ties are UNKNOWN. Unit name is never inferred from magnitude.

name: token_association
value: Build a definition-level 2x2 table between presence of at least one bbox_units numeric dimension candidate and O-B pair positivity; report cells, conditional rates, risk ratio when its denominator is nonzero, and odds ratio only when all four cells are nonzero. Separately tokenize definition names on non-alphanumeric boundaries, casefold, retain tokens with support >=5, and report support plus P(O-A positive|token) and P(O-B positive|token). Undefined quantities remain UNKNOWN; no continuity correction.

name: n_h_ornith
value: Read handle_audit.per_judge[judge=ornith_v0].n_cited_distinct as n_h_ornith and cross-check equality to n_cited plus n_nonexistent=0. Because ornith raw is not authorized, individual-handle reconstruction is UNKNOWN rather than substituted from panel handles.
